# FID — Trust / proof / originality

Genus: **Fides**

Whether evidence and creator judgment preserve trust.

| ID | Scientific-style name | Area | Hypothesis | Metric | Method |

| H178 | *Fides storyformis* var. h178-street-interviews-retain | Street interview / vox pop | Street interviews retain better when the question is displayed before the answer. | MIX | M-MPT |

| H190 | *Fides commercialis* var. h190-believable-they-include | UGC ad / testimonial | UGC ads are more believable when they include a specific situation rather than generic praise. | MIX | M-MPT |

| H192 | *Fides commercialis* var. h192-polish-beats-polished | UGC ad / testimonial | Low-polish UGC beats polished brand footage when authenticity is the main value proposition. | MIX | M-MPT |

| H200 | *Fides verticalis* var. h200-form-correction-clips | Fitness / workout | Form-correction clips retain better when the wrong form is shown first. | MIX | M-MPT |

| H221 | *Fides fiduciae* var. h221-reviews-retain-verdict | Comparison / review | Reviews retain better when the verdict is previewed early and explained later. | EHR | M-MPT |
| H224 | *Fides pulsus* var. h224-motion-graphics-need | Motion graphic / carousel-style video | Motion graphics need restrained animation; too much movement competes with reading. | MIX | M-MPT |
| H225 | *Fides probatoria* var. h225-save-rate-rises | Motion graphic / carousel-style video | Save rate rises when the final frame summarises the framework as a screenshotable card. | SAV | M-MPT |
| H281 | *Fides facialis* var. h281-large-faces-help | 1-second hold | Large faces help 1-second hold for unknown creators, but proof must follow quickly. | EHR | M-MPT |

| H296 | *Fides probatoria* var. h296-final-screenshotable-cards | Saves | Final screenshotable cards raise saves for frameworks and recipes. | SAV | M-MPT |

| H315 | *Fides probatoria* var. h315-looking-generic-templates | Trust / negative feedback | AI-looking generic templates reduce trust unless paired with original proof, voice or judgment. | TRU | M-MPT |
